scope: Evaluation-only requalification of the one-pass 34.28M exact-count GaugeFlow-base joint product model after the frozen VP posterior correction; node-count sampling law, seeds, panel, thresholds and candidate set are unchanged.

superseded_result.reason: v1 compared samples from the explicitly train-fitted p(N) to the formula/prototype-disjoint validation marginal. That split has a different node-count support distribution, producing checkpoint-invariant JSD 0.36364 even though the sampler exactly used its declared law. v1.1 changes only the reference distribution of this engineering closure metric; all samples, thresholds, seeds, geometry references and model weights remain unchanged.

decision_rule.pass: qualify GaugeFlow-base A1 only in its tensor-free free-generation scope
decision_rule.fail: stop before physical pretraining and attribute assignment, lattice and coordinate oracle-free gaps without tensor, RL, relaxation, DFT or DFPT
decision_rule.boundary: This Gate does not qualify OOD parent carriers, tensor conditioning, physical representation transfer, relaxation, DFT, DFPT or materials discovery.
